PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: personality moods
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a mood that fits the grain of who this pawn is - write the feeling and let their temperament show in how they take it, without naming a personality type

instructions.li: personality mood - write the feeling in the pawn's own characteristic key: what someone like them makes of it
personality mood - keep it to one honest beat; this is temperament coloring a mood, not an event

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: colored by the pawn's own temperament

tones.li: true to character, the same event felt the way this pawn would feel it
quiet and inward, a mood filtered through who they are

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: personality chemistry
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: two temperaments meeting - center the felt fit or friction between these two people, not the words traded

instructions.li: personality chemistry - write whether being around this person eased the pawn or grated on them, and why it sat that way
personality chemistry - name the difference or likeness underneath it, only as the pawn would feel it, never as a category
personality chemistry - keep it to this one meeting; no grand verdict on the whole relationship

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: attuned to the chemistry between two people

tones.li: observant of fit and friction, the small read of another temperament
quietly personal, how this particular person leaves the pawn feeling
